templates.name: homepage
templates.description: Marketing homepage: dark hero with search form, dual promo heroes, multiple card grids, expandable solutions carousel, stats facts, AI index table, and customer quote.

templates.name: product-toolkit-overview
templates.description: Product/toolkit landing page: hero, alternating feature card grids, tabbed feature sections, and a feature comparison block.

templates.name: ai-toolkit-overview
templates.description: AI Visibility toolkit overview landing page (client-rendered hero + feature sections).

templates.name: traffic-toolkit-overview
templates.description: Traffic & Market toolkit overview landing page (client-rendered feature sections).

templates.name: app-center-listing
templates.description: App Center directory: repeating app card grids listing available apps.

templates.name: app-detail
templates.description: Individual app detail page: hero, column feature rows, and a carousel of related screenshots.

templates.name: blog-index
templates.description: Blog landing/index: featured card grids and carousels of article cards.

templates.name: company-about
templates.description: About/company page: hero plus a long stack of column rows (values, team, milestones) and card groups.

templates.name: contact-page
templates.description: Company contacts page (client-rendered contact details and form).

templates.name: legal-document
templates.description: Legal/policy long-form text page (privacy policy).

templates.name: success-stories-index
templates.description: Customer success stories index: carousel and column/card rows of case-study entries.

templates.name: content-toolkit-overview
templates.description: Content toolkit overview landing page (client-rendered feature sections).

templates.name: features-overview
templates.description: All-features overview: hero, tabbed sections, and a large repeating feature card grid.

templates.name: conversion-landing
templates.description: Conversion-focused landing pages (free tools hub, free-trial signup) that render their content client-side with a minimal shell.

templates.name: free-tool-detail
templates.description: Individual free-tool page: hero, feature cards, and alternating column explainer rows.

templates.name: local-toolkit-overview
templates.description: Local toolkit overview landing page (client-rendered feature sections).

templates.name: news-index
templates.description: News/press release index page (hero plus client-rendered article list).

templates.name: semrush-one-product
templates.description: Semrush One flagship product page (video-led, mostly client-rendered).

templates.name: pr-toolkit-overview
templates.description: PR toolkit overview: hero plus stacked column feature rows.

templates.name: pricing-page
templates.description: Pricing page with plan/tier comparison (client-rendered pricing tables).

templates.name: seo-toolkit-overview
templates.description: SEO toolkit overview: dual heroes, column rows, multiple feature carousels, and an FAQ accordion.

templates.name: social-toolkit-overview
templates.description: Social toolkit overview landing page (client-rendered feature sections).

templates.name: stats-facts-page
templates.description: Stats & facts page: hero, stat cards, column rows, and data tables.

templates.name: comparison-index
templates.description: Compare-Semrush hub listing competitor comparison links (client-rendered).

templates.name: comparison-detail
templates.description: Head-to-head competitor comparison page (Semrush vs Ahrefs).

templates.name: top-websites-ranking
templates.description: Top websites ranking page: filter form, ranked data columns, and an FAQ accordion.
